# R1.07 · Workshop — cache codemojex's emoji set

> The chapter capstone: assemble the read-path patterns into one working cache for codemojex's emoji
> set — wire it, keep it consistent, harden and measure it. Grounded in `Codemojex.Guesses.submit/3` keyboard
> validation cached through `EchoStore.Table` (`fetch` / `Coherence` / `stats`); real Valkey GET / SET PX / PUBLISH.
> Served at /redis-patterns/caching/workshop.

## Pages

- [Hub](/redis-patterns/caching/workshop): the end-to-end build, in three stages.
- [Cache the catalog](/redis-patterns/caching/workshop/cache-the-catalog): wire `Table.fetch/3` (miss-fill over `ecc:{cm_emojisets}:<id>`) over the emoji set the play API checks every guess against.
- [Keep it consistent](/redis-patterns/caching/workshop/keep-it-consistent): on an edit, `Coherence.broadcast` (at-most-once) vs `Coherence.enqueue` (at-least-once over EchoMQ), reconciled by `newer?/2`.
- [Harden and measure](/redis-patterns/caching/workshop/harden-and-measure): the single-flight `flights` map + jittered TTL as the hardening, and `Table.stats/1` counters for the hit rate.

## Up

- [R1 · Caching](/redis-patterns/caching) · [Course home](/redis-patterns)
